parameters.subject: =File Attached to Task: {{$json.task_title}}
parameters.html:
=

Dear {{$json.task_owner_firstname}} {{$json.task_owner_lastname}},

A file has been added to the task {{$json.task_title}}.

Attachment Details

Task Title {{$json.task_title}}
File Name {{$json.file_name}}
File Type {{$json.file_type}}
Uploaded On {{$json.file_added_at}}
Task Created On {{$json.task_created_at}}
Task End On {{$json.task_due_date}}
Milestone {{$json.milestone_title || 'N/A'}}
Project {{$json.project_title}}
Task URL View Task

Please review the attached document as part of task execution.

Regards,
Document & Task Management System

parameters.query:
SELECT
  af.id                    AS attachment_id,
  af.document_file_name    AS file_name,
  af.document_content_type AS file_type,
  af.created_at            AS file_added_at,

  t.id                     AS task_id,
  t.title                  AS task_title,
  t.parent_id              AS parent_id,
  t.created_at             AS task_created_at,
  t.target_date            AS task_due_date,

  m.id                     AS milestone_id,
  m.title                  AS milestone_title,

  pm.id                    AS project_id,
  pm.title                 AS project_title,

  u.id                     AS task_owner_id,
  u.email                  AS task_owner_email,
  u.firstname              AS task_owner_firstname,
  u.lastname               AS task_owner_lastname,

  GROUP_CONCAT(obs.id ORDER BY obs.id) AS observer_ids,
  GROUP_CONCAT(obs.firstname ORDER BY obs.id) AS observer_first_names,
  GROUP_CONCAT(obs.lastname ORDER BY obs.id) AS observer_last_names,
  GROUP_CONCAT(obs.email ORDER BY obs.id) AS observer_emails

FROM attachfiles af

JOIN task_managements t
  ON t.id = af.relation_id
 AND af.relation = 'TaskManagement'

LEFT JOIN milestones m
  ON m.id = t.milestone_id

JOIN project_managements pm
  ON pm.id = t.project_management_id

JOIN spree_users u
  ON u.id = t.responsible_person_id

LEFT JOIN task_users tu
  ON tu.task_id = t.id
  AND tu.user_type = 'observer'
  AND tu.active = 1

LEFT JOIN spree_users obs
  ON obs.id = tu.user_id

WHERE
  af.created_at >= UTC_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL 10 MINUTE
  AND af.active = 1
  AND t.parent_id IS NULL
  AND u.organization_id IN (13, 14, 59, 84)

GROUP BY af.id;
SELECT * FROM attachfiles ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5;

mySql.name: New FM UAT Task Management Database

parameters.query:
SELECT
  af.id                    AS attachment_id,
  af.document_file_name    AS file_name,
  af.document_content_type AS file_type,
  af.created_at            AS file_added_at,

  t.id                     AS task_id,
  t.title                  AS task_title,
  t.parent_id              AS parent_id,
  t.created_at             AS task_created_at,
  t.target_date            AS task_due_date,

  -- milestone (optional)
  m.id                     AS milestone_id,
  m.title                  AS milestone_title,

  -- project
  pm.id                    AS project_id,
  pm.title                 AS project_title,

  -- task owner
  u.id                     AS task_owner_id,
  u.email                  AS task_owner_email,
  u.firstname              AS task_owner_firstname,
  u.lastname               AS task_owner_lastname

FROM attachfiles af

JOIN task_managements t
  ON t.id = af.relation_id
 AND af.relation = 'TaskManagement'

-- milestone (optional)
LEFT JOIN milestones m
  ON m.id = t.milestone_id

-- project (direct from task)
JOIN project_managements pm
  ON pm.id = t.project_management_id

-- task owner
JOIN spree_users u
  ON u.id = t.responsible_person_id

WHERE
  af.created_at >= UTC_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL 60 MINUTE
  AND af.active = 1
  AND t.parent_id IS NULL;

parameters.query:
SELECT
  af.id                    AS attachment_id,
  af.document_file_name    AS file_name,
  af.document_content_type AS file_type,
  af.created_at            AS file_added_at,

  t.id                     AS task_id,
  t.title                  AS task_title,
  t.parent_id              AS parent_id,
  t.created_at             AS task_created_at,
  t.target_date            AS task_due_date,

  m.id                     AS milestone_id,
  m.title                  AS milestone_title,

  pm.id                    AS project_id,
  pm.title                 AS project_title,

  u.id                     AS task_owner_id,
  u.email                  AS task_owner_email,
  u.firstname              AS task_owner_firstname,
  u.lastname               AS task_owner_lastname,

  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT obs.id ORDER BY obs.id) AS observer_ids,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT obs.firstname ORDER BY obs.id) AS observer_first_names,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT obs.lastname ORDER BY obs.id) AS observer_last_names,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT obs.email ORDER BY obs.id) AS observer_emails

FROM attachfiles af

JOIN task_managements t
  ON t.id = af.relation_id
 AND af.relation = 'TaskManagement'

LEFT JOIN milestones m
  ON m.id = t.milestone_id

JOIN project_managements pm
  ON pm.id = t.project_management_id

JOIN spree_users u
  ON u.id = t.responsible_person_id

LEFT JOIN task_users tu
  ON tu.task_id = t.id
  AND tu.user_type = 'observer'
  AND tu.active = 1

LEFT JOIN spree_users obs
  ON obs.id = tu.user_id

WHERE
  af.created_at >= UTC_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL 10 MINUTE
  AND af.active = 1
  AND t.parent_id IS NULL

GROUP BY af.id;
